description: Canonical map of the ArchonVII meta/ecosystem layer (providers, integrator, skill source). Roles mirror src/server/ecosystem/repoRegistry.json. Snapshot facts for provider repos are joined live from src/snapshots/manifest.json at render time, not stored here. This map intentionally excludes application/consumer repos so the per-repo coordination-isolation contract is preserved.

repos.name: .github
repos.summary: Org-level community-health defaults that auto-apply to any ArchonVII repo lacking its own copy.
consumers: every ArchonVII repo without a repo-local override

repos.name: github-workflows
repos.summary: Reusable GitHub Actions workflows, consumed by callers at the moving @v1 major tag, plus scripts/setup-repo.mjs.
consumers: caller workflows in every onboarded repo (pinned at @v1)

versioning.retagPolicy: v1 is a deliberately-moved major tag; retag only via the leased v1-retag pattern after the owner go

repos.name: repo-template
repos.summary: Passive clone-target template. Its AGENTS.md is the canonical per-repo cross-tool agent contract; archon-setup snapshots from here.

repos.name: archon-setup
repos.summary: The integrator. Bootstraps and audits repos, holds SHA-pinned snapshots of the three providers under src/snapshots/, owns the feature registry, the global update catalog, and the ecosystem-state health surface. The only repo that legitimately references all siblings.
consumers: agents onboarding or auditing repos; users running npx @archonvii/archon-setup

repos.name: jma-skill-review
repos.summary: Source-of-truth checkout for shared agent skills and personas. shared/ is exposed to Claude/Codex/Gemini via per-CLI junction aliases; loading still comes from the active session registry, not a path assumption.
consumers: Claude/Codex/Gemini skill roots (junction aliases to shared/)

aliases.note: Verify each with Get-Item before treating as a junction; do not infer from path text.
